title: Technically Enhanced
description: A lightweight modpack featuring powerful tools like Masa’s mods (Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, Litematica), Carpet, and other utilities, combined with optimization mods like Sodium and Lithium, all while keeping vanilla gameplay intact.
body:
## Technical Focus
The **Technically Enhanced** modpack is all about giving you **powerful tools** and **advanced controls** while staying close to the **vanilla** Minecraft experience. It improves **building**, **automation**, and **gameplay control** without changing how the game feels.

  
- 🪶 Lightweight and efficient with minimal impact on performance
  
- ⚖️ Stays close to vanilla gameplay with no core mechanic changes 
  
- 🧱 Powerful building tools like WorldEdit and Litematica
  
- 🛠️ Advanced utilities including Carpet, Tweakeroo, MiniHUD, and Item Scroller
  
- ✨ Quality-of-life improvements like zoom, fullbright, and hand restock 
  
- 🔧 Highly customizable tools to fit your playstyle


  
  
> ### ⚠️ Some features in Tweakeroo may be considered cheating on certain multiplayer servers.         Make sure to check the server rules before using them.


## 🔗 Other Packs in the Enhanced Series
 

- **[Enhanced Quality](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-quality)**  
  Improves visuals, audio, and adds quality-of-life features.

- **[Enhanced FPS](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-fps)**  
  Lightweight pack focused on maximizing performance.

- **[Enhanced FPS NeoForge](https://modrinth.com/modpack/enhanced-fps-forge)**  
  NeoForge version of the pack.   

## ⌨️ Keybinds
<details><summary> Keybinds </summary>
  
**Keybinds to open menu:**
- Tweakeroo: X+C
- Item scroller: I+C
- Malilib: A+C
- Litematica: M (M+C works also)
- MiniHUD: H+C
  
</details>

## 📦 List of Mods


<details><summary> Performance Mods (7) </summary>

[BetterBlockEntities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities) by [cseden](https://modrinth.com/user/cseden)

[EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)

[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC)

[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) by [astei](https://modrinth.com/user/astei)

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [2No2Name](https://modrinth.com/user/2No2Name)

[Fastnoise](https://modrinth.com/mod/zfastnoise) by [ZenXArch](https://modrinth.com/user/ZenXArch)

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)
</details>

<details><summary> Utility Mods (10) </summary>

[Carpet](https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet) by [gnembon](https://github.com/gnembon) (includes [Carpet TIS Addition](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-tis-addition) by [Fallen Breath](https://modrinth.com/user/fallen-breath))

[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot)

[Litematica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/litematica), [MiniHud](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/minihud), [Syncmatica](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/syncmatica), [Tweakeroo](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/tweakeroo) and [Item Scroller](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/itemscroller) by [Masa](https://github.com/maruohon) (the newer versions of these mods are currently maintained by [Sakura Ryoko](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko))

[Spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark) by [lucko](https://modrinth.com/user/lucko)

[Worldedit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) by [me4502](https://modrinth.com/user/me4502)
</details> 
<details><summary> Misc Mods (8) </summary>
  
[ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector)

[NoChatReports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) by [Aizistral](https://modrinth.com/user/Aizistral)

[Reese'sSodiumOptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) and [SodiumExtra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) by [FlashyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)

[RemoveReloadingScreen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) by [dima_dencep](https://modrinth.com/user/dima_dencep)

**Mod Libraries and APIs**

[ClothConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel)

[FabricAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)

[MaliLib](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko/malilib) by [Masa](https://github.com/maruohon)
</details>
